title: should render page with all three cards visible
verifies: Page loads with title and all three card sections present in DOM

title: should show fruit select default empty state
verifies: Fruit card shows placeholder and default empty output text

title: should select Apple fruit and update output
verifies: Selecting Apple updates fruit output and trigger label/attribute correctly

title: should switch fruit to Banana then Cherry
verifies: Sequential fruit selections update output for each fruit

title: should show location default state with city disabled
verifies: Location card default with no country, city disabled, and placeholder text

title: should enable city after selecting country India
verifies: Selecting a country enables the city dropdown and shows intermediate output

title: should select India → Bengaluru and show full cascading output
verifies: Full cascading country+city selection produces the combined location sentence

title: should show mode card default Basic state
verifies: Mode card defaults to Basic with correct output and advanced panel absent

title: should switch to Advanced mode and show priority panel
verifies: Advanced toggle reveals priority panel with correct empty-state output

title: should select High priority in Advanced mode
verifies: Selecting High priority updates output and trigger label correctly

title: should show combined banner when Cherry + Advanced + High
verifies: Combined-rule banner appears when all three cross-section conditions are met

title: should hide combined banner when fruit changes away from Cherry
verifies: Banner is removed from DOM when fruit is no longer Cherry

title: should hide combined banner when priority changes from High
verifies: Banner is removed from DOM when priority is no longer High

title: should hide combined banner and advanced panel on toggle to Basic
verifies: Basic toggle removes both advanced panel and combined banner from DOM

title: should NOT show combined banner when conditions not fully met
verifies: Banner does not appear when Cherry+Advanced+Low (priority not High)

title: should reset city when country changes
verifies: Changing country resets city selection and reverts location output

title: should show all sections independently correct simultaneously
verifies: All three sections can be set simultaneously without cross-interference

title: should show correct city options for each country
verifies: Each country shows correct city subset: India(Bengaluru,Mumbai), USA(SF,NY), Japan(Tokyo,Osaka)

title: should have exactly 3 fruit options with no clear option
verifies: Fruit cannot be cleared — exactly 3 options exist with no blank/deselect entry

title: should fully remove advanced panel from DOM on Basic toggle (v-if)
verifies: Advanced panel is fully removed from DOM (v-if) and reappears on re-toggle

title: should be immediately interactive with no loading states
verifies: Page has no loading delays — fruit dropdown opens immediately on click
